body:
## Rationale

**Priority: 🟡 MEDIUM — high-TAM names missing from 23 current soundLike guides**

Confirmed NOT in soundLikeGuides.js (23 existing) and NOT in any open soundLike batch proposal (#2015 batch 3, #2135 batch 5 split → #2224-#2227, #2148 batch 7, #2271 batch 12, #2342 batch 13, #2361 batch 14, #2388 batch 15, #2426 batch 16 [Frost/Blake/Arin]).

**Batch 17 subjects:**

### 1. Mike Portnoy
- Dream Theater co-founder, prog metal legend, left DT in 2010
- Highest-searched prog drummer globally
- Rich technique profile: odd time, complex fills, orchestral dynamics
- No soundLike guide exists despite 62 comparisons vs other prog drummers
- Search query: "how to sound like mike portnoy"

### 2. Shannon Larkin
- **GA4 organic signal confirmed** — 7 users in last 7d, #6 GA4 page
- Godsmack drummer, mainstream rock crossover with metal chops
- Distinct style: hard-hitting rock groove + aggressive double-bass
- Shannon Larkin Faceless article shipped (#2147/#2285); soundLike guide is the natural companion content
- Search query: "how to sound like shannon larkin"

### 3. Scott Travis
- Judas Priest drummer since 1989, NWOBHM-meets-modern-metal style
- Firepower article in ai-fix; AORT in ai-fix; Invincible Shield (#2431) just filed — perfect timing for soundLike guide
- Distinct style: precise groove-oriented playing vs classic double-bass metal
- Search query: "how to sound like scott travis"

## Template / Data shape

Each guide follows the established soundLikeGuides.js pattern:
```js
{
  slug: 'how-to-sound-like-[drummer]',
  drummer: '[Drummer Name]',
  band: '[Band]',
  description: '...',
  techniques: [...],
  gear: { drums: '...', cymbals: '...', pedals: '...' },
  linkedArticles: [...existing album article slugs...],
  faq: [{ q: '...', a: '...' }, ...],  // ≥3 Q&A
}
```

## LLM files

For each guide, create:
- `/public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-[drummer].md`

## Files to touch

- `/packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js` — add 3 new guide objects
- `/public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-mike-portnoy.md`
- `/public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-shannon-larkin.md`
- `/public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-scott-travis.md`
- `/api/sitemap.js` — add 3 new URLs (or use data-driven sitemap if available)

## Expected page count

3 new guide pages

## Quality gate

- ≥300 words per guide
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A per guide
- ≥3 internal links per guide (to existing album articles for that drummer)
- HowTo or Article JSON-LD schema per guide (see #2202 for schema pattern)
- LLM companion file created

## Estimated organic uplift

Addresses "how to sound like [drummer]" long-tail cluster — same format as existing high-CTR guides (dave-lombardo: 50%, joey-jordison: proven GA4 format). Mike Portnoy = highest new TAM in this batch (prog-metal audience, million+ YouTube subscribers).

Serves GSC bucket: technique/gear advice queries; supports AI Overview eligibility via HowTo schema.

## Verify

1. `grep 'how-to-sound-like-mike-portnoy\|how-to-sound-like-shannon-larkin\|how-to-sound-like-scott-travis' packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js` → 3 hits
2. All 3 LLM files exist under `public/llms/guides/`
3. Sitemap includes all 3 new URLs
4. `curl https://metalforge.io/guides/how-to-sound-like-mike-portnoy` → 200
5. HowTo schema present (Rich Results Test)

## Done

- [ ] 3 guide objects added to soundLikeGuides.js
- [ ] 3 LLM companion files created
- [ ] Sitemap updated
title: SEO batch: SoundLike guide batch 17 — Mike Portnoy + Shannon Larkin + Scott Travis (~3 guides + 3 LLM files)
